text.title: Diary Studies Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Diary Studies to a concrete case.

section.title: Sleep app 14-day study

example.code:
Study: sleep-app-q2 — 14 days, 12 participants (primary + secondary), reminder cadence: 22:00 local + SMS at 23:30 if no entry.
Completion: 10 participants >=70%; 2 excluded.
Themes: - wind-down routine effectiveness (6/10): 'fell asleep within 15 min after the breath exercise' - weekend pattern break (5/10): all entries note disrupted sleep on Sat-Sun - snooze loop (4/10): same participants 4+ days; alarm UI implicated
Implications: weekend mode + redesigned snooze.

section.note: Longitudinal pattern (weekend break) only visible because of multi-day entries; per-participant completion tracked + low-completion excluded.
